Blog
Marketing support

Partner Call-Out Days.

Structured, high-energy days of outbound activity run at your office. The Purple team joins your sales reps on the floor, working through your existing pipeline together to identify the best-fit accounts and get conversations started.

Book a Call-Out Day

Ready to get a day on the calendar? We'll help you pick a date and lock in the details.

What happens on the day.

The Purple team joins you

We'll work the floor alongside your sales team all day, running live coaching, answering objections in real time, and jumping on calls when a deal needs an extra voice.

Battlecards and talk tracks

Sector-specific battlecards, objection-handling cheat sheets, and call scripts land with your reps before the day starts, so every conversation has the right proof points to hand.

Prizes and friendly competition

Vouchers, sweets, and small prizes for hitting milestones keep the energy up and turn a normal outbound day into a friendly competition between reps.

Results, celebrated

A post-event performance report shows what the day achieved, calls made, meetings booked, pipeline generated, and the team celebrates the numbers together before it wraps.

Partners
Purple Partners, the channel program for resellers, MSPs, and systems integrators selling identity-based WiFi solutions.
